problem id: f94ed862
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHL(4)

examples:
  11111110 -> 11110111
  11000000 -> 00000110
  01010111 -> 11111010
  11110001 -> 10011111
  11010111 -> 11111110
  01011100 -> 11100010
  00100110 -> 01110001
  10111000 -> 11000101

query: 00110110
predicted answer: 11110001
